title: Keep white text on image background section, revert all other text to black

requirements.summary: Keep all text in the Hero section (background image) white, including headline, tagline, stat labels, and subheading
acceptanceCriteria: All text inside the Hero component (background image section) remains white.
Stat labels 'Years Experience', 'Jobs Completed', 'Satisfaction' remain white.
Hero headline and tagline remain white.

file_operations.description: Review and ensure all text elements (headline, tagline, stat labels, subheading, scroll indicator text) use text-white or equivalent white text utility classes. Verify that no text in this component uses dark/black color classes.

requirements.summary: Change all text in non-Hero sections (About, Services, Contact, Footer, Navigation) from white back to black or dark ink color
acceptanceCriteria: Body text, labels, descriptions, and headings in About, Services, Contact, Footer, and Navigation sections are displayed in black or dark ink color.
No white text appears on sections that do not have a dark/image background.
The overall page is readable with dark text on light/white section backgrounds.

file_operations.description: Replace all text-white classes with text-gray-900 or text-ink for body text, descriptions, quotes, and labels. Ensure headings and paragraph text display in dark ink on the light background.

Change any white text classes to text-gray-900 or text-ink for service card titles, descriptions, section headers, and the service area banner text. Ensure all text is readable as dark on light background.
Replace text-white classes with text-gray-900 or text-ink for contact descriptions, labels, card text, and CTA messaging. Keep all contact section text dark for readability on light background.
Change all text-white classes to text-gray-900 or text-ink for footer descriptions, quick links, service lists, and contact details. Restore dark text appearance for all footer content.
Replace any text-white classes with text-gray-900 or text-ink for navigation links and menu items (both desktop and mobile). Do not modify the PFH logo. Ensure nav text is dark and readable.
